name: vellum
description: An atelier of imaginary cartography — procedurally surveys worlds that don't exist and drafts them as antique atlas charts.

scripts.site: node scripts/build-site.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.browser.json && node scripts/build-explorer-bundle.ts docs
scripts.astro:generate: node scripts/clean-public-generated.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.browser.json --outDir public/explorer/engine && node scripts/build-explorer-bundle.ts public
scripts.build: node scripts/build-dist.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.browser.json --outDir dist/explorer/engine && node scripts/build-explorer-bundle.ts dist
